name: Path Equivalence: 'file.name' (Internal Dot)
description: The product does not properly handle paths containing internal dots that create ambiguous path resolution, where the dot could be interpreted as a file extension separator or a directory traversal component depending on the platform.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides a path with internal dot patterns that the CONTROL[path_check] interprets differently from the OS filesystem resolution at STORAGE[file_access], creating a mismatch between what is checked and what is accessed
